X.T: A l'aube d'un monde : la science confie à un poète l'honneur d'être votre guide

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The beginning of the nuclear industry in France.

X.T: La vallée des piles

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The beginning of the Cadarache centre.

X.T: Construction de la centrale de BRENNILIS

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Les atteliers de traitement de l'uranium enirichi à Cadarache

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Portes ouvertes sur le chantier de Fessenheim

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: L'uranium énergie de notre temps

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The French nuclear industry, mostly Tricastin, in the eighties, with some strange comments.

X.T: La cuve de l’EPR : leçons médiatiques

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A journalist is critical toward his peers who gave too quickly conclusions about the defects in the vessel steel.

X.T: Hiroshima, Tchernobyl, Fukushima... Les morts du nucléaire.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The scientific data about the impact of radiation is much less sinister than common belief.

X.T: Les ressources d'uranium.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Some information about uranium resources.

X.T: Fonctionnement des centrales nucléaires (canicule, tritium, durée de vie...).

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Some basic knowledge on nuclear plants.

X.T: ⚡☢️🗑️ De la centrale aux déchets radioactifs.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Some general information about nuclear wastes: a reminder of the difference between hazard and risk, the elements produced during the nuclear reaction, how are managed the minor actinides.

X.T: ⚡☢️🗑️ Peut-on faire disparaître les déchets radioactifs ?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Transmutation, MOX fuel, the fact that a material is a waste or not depends on the future of the nuclear industry.

X.T: ⚡☢️🗑️ Gestion des déchets nucléaires et démantèlement.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The other types of radioactive wastes and the decommissioning of nuclear plants.

X.T: ⚡☢️🗑️ Stockage géologique profond des déchets radioactifs - DÉCHETS RADIOACTIFS #4

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The storing of long-lived radioactive wastes in a deep geological repository, this is mostly about Cigéo.

X.T: [ANNEXE] ⚡☢️🗑️ Stockage géologique profond des déchets radioactifs.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The complement of the previous video.

X.T: This billion-euro nuclear reactor was never switched on

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Zwentendorf nuclear power plant was fully built but never started.

X.T: A Brief History of: The HTRE no.3 Reactor Meltdown (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When GE tried to build a nuclear reactor for aircraft propulsion.

X.T: Fermeture de Fessenheim, une victoire pour l'écologie ?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: An analysis of Fessenheim plant closure.

X.T: A Brief History of: The SNAPTRAN Reactor destruction Experiments (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The destructive test of a nuclear reactor for space probes.

X.T: Immersion dans le cœur de Doel 4

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A timelapse of the maintenance and refueling of one of Doel reactors.

X.T: ☢️ Le CONFINEMENT des centrales nucléaires ! - Monsieur Bidouille

ARTICLE.COMMENT: How EDF is studying the ageing of concrete.

X.T: [Histoire] L’épopée de la pile atomique ZOE, premier réacteur nucléaire français

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The history of the discovery and experimentatioon with radioactivity up to the Zoé reactor.

X.T: Nucléaire : un atout pour l'indépendance de la France ?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: France has a lot of uranium stocks and has mostly the control of the whole nuclear energy chain.

X.T: Vous n’avez jamais vu ces réacteurs nucléaires ☢️ - Monsieur Bidouille

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A visit and description of the G1, G2, and G3 reactors.

X.T: Relance du nucléaire : la nouvelle ruée vers l’uranium naturel

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The current status of uranium production in the world.

X.T: Nucléaire : une énergie inadaptée au changement climatique ?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The impact of climate change on the French nuclear plants.

X.T: Déchets nucléaires : la face cachée de notre énergie

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The complex situation with nuclear fuel recycling and the problem of La Hague pools getting saturated.

X.T: Ce réacteur nucléaire ne produira pas d’énergie ☢️ - Monsieur Bidouille

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A presentation of Jules Horowitz Reactor, a future materials testing and medical-radioisotope producing reactor.

X.T: Le réacteur Proserpine : un jalon fondateur des recherches françaises sur la sûreté-criticité

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The study of criticality at the beginning of the French nuclear industry and, in particular, the Proserpine reactor.

X.T: 1000 ans de carburant nucléaire 🇫🇷 : Pourquoi on ne l’utilise pas (encore) ?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of LFR-AS-30, a small lead-cooled fast reactor.

X.T: [Replay] Webinaire #1 : Une histoire du nucléaire en France (1945-1986)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: From the beginning of the nuclear industry in France up to the Chernobyl accident.

X.T: [Replay] Webinaire #2 : Une histoire du nucléaire en France (1986-2026)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The second part: the impact of the Chernobyl and Fukushima accidents, the political decisions, the changing opinion of the French population…

X.T: Le réacteur nucléaire le plus mignon du monde – Monsieur Bidouille

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A presentation of CROCUS, EPFL’s small experimental reactor.

X.T: The Liquid Fluoride Thorium Reactor: What Fusion Wanted To Be

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of a reactor design using thorium. JoeBonometti explains its advantages compared to the current nuclear plant technologies: simpler, safer, more fuel reserves, faster decay of waste…

X.T: Save the Uranium-233, Explore Space, Save Lives

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Using the current US’s Uranium-233 stock in a Liquid Fluoride Thorium Reactor to produce electricity, Plutonium-238 for NASA and Technetium-99m for oncology.

X.T: THE THORIUM PROBLEM - Manufacturing & energy sector hobbled by thorium

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A badly edited video from a proponent of liquid fluoride thorium reactor.

X.T: The Magic of Thorium Nuclear Reactors

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A short presentation of how a thorium reactor works.

X.T: Arctic Sea Dumping

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A summary of the USSR dumping of military nuclear waste and their potential impact on Norway.

X.T: U.S. Nuclear Accidents

ARTICLE.COMMENT: This is a list of the nuclear accidents in the US.

X.T: Radiation Killed Douglas Crofut. No One Knows Why.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: DouglasCrofut probably committed suicide with a radiographic source.

X.T: Did a Nuclear Accident Just Go Viral?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A fake video of someone playing with an orphan source.

X.T: Du drame à la prévention : ce que Tchernobyl et Fukushima ont changé dans le domaine nucléaire civil

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The security improvements after Chernobyl and Fukushima accidents, in particular the Uranium oxide doping with chromium to obtain larger crystals and slow down the diffusion of radioactive gases.

X.T: The World's First Nuclear Reactor Disaster

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The Leipzig L-IV experiment accident.

X.T: Restoration of the NRX Reactor: The First Meltdown (1959)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The NRX accident and the reparation of the reactor.

X.T: The NRX Incident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: This is a presentation of the partial meltdown of NRX, an experimental nuclear reactor in Canada.

X.T: Brief History of: The NRX reactor Accident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the accident.

X.T: Nuclear Reactor Melted Down Deliberately To See what would Happen | Plainly Difficult

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The deliberate destructive test of the BORAX-II reactor.

X.T: Ozersk

ARTICLE.COMMENT: This is another article on Chelyabinsk. This one is more technical and speaks less about the human impact than the next one.

X.T: CHELYABINSK: THE MOST CONTAMINATED SPOT ON THE PLANET

ARTICLE.COMMENT: These pages contains the materials of a film about the Chelyabinsk region.

X.T: Brief History of: The Windscale fire

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the accident.

X.T: The Vinča Nuclear Reactor Excursion Event 1958 | Plainly Difficult Short Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Six persons have been irradiated by an experimental reactor and have been treated in Paris.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Cecil Kelley Nuclear Accident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the criticality incident.

X.T: Radioactive Autopsy - The Cecil Kelley Criticality Accident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: CecilKelley’s accident, the Los Alamos Tissue Program, and the Human Plutonium Injection Experiments.

BLIST.TITLE: Santa Susana Field Laboratory’s Sodium Reactor Experiment (19597)

X.T: A Brief History of: The Sodium Reactor Experiment Accident (short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the incident.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Waltz Mill Meltdown (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The meltdown of a fuel element in an experimental reactor.

X.T: A Brief History of: The SL-1 Reactor Accident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The SL-1 accident: a single control rod was withdrawn too far.

X.T: SL-1: America's First Nuclear Disaster

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The same.

X.T: A Brief History of: The K-19 Reactor Incident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The mortal repairing of the reactor coolant system.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Wood River Junction Criticality (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: RobertPeabody picked a wrong bottle and this error resulted in a criticality accident.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Fermi 1 Reactor Meltdown (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The partial meltdown of a breeder reactor.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Lucens Reactor Meltdown (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The partial core meltdown of a reactor located in a Swiss cave.

X.T: Doomed: The Czechoslovakian Nuclear Reactor That Kept on Having Accidents | Plainly Difficult

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The two accidents of the Jaslovské Bohunice Nuclear Power Plant.

X.T: Backgrounder on the Three Mile Island Accident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A fact sheet on the accident: description, health effects, and ensuing decisions.

X.T: Inside Three Mile Island: Moment by Moment

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The narration of the March 28, 1979 accident. This is a good factual paper, maybe slightly sensationalistic. The consequences of the accident are not tackled.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Three Mile Island Accident (Short Documentary) (Part 1)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A summary of the accident.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Three Mile Island Accident (Short Documentary) (Part 2)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The continuation of the previous video.

X.T: Three Mile Island - What Really Happened

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The communication catastophe of TMI.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Church Rock Uranium Mill Disaster (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The dam of a tailings disposal pond ruptured, contaminating the Navajo Nation.

X.T: The Nuclear Power-station that Kept on Having Meltdowns: Saint Laurent 1969 & 1980

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The two accidents of Saint-Laurent Nuclear Power Plant.

X.T: When Saving Time Leads To Complacency

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When an operator wants to get the job done too fast and does not remove all the moderating water from the reactor…

X.T: The Ciudad Juárez Cobalt-60 Radiation Incident 1984 | Plainly Difficult Disaster Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: How Cobalt-60 ended in some rebars and was discovered by sheer luck.

X.T: A Brief History of: Sequoyah Fuels corporation Radiation Event (Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Heating a gas tank is a bad idea.

X.T: Chernobyl - Ten Years On: Radiological and Health Impact
X.ST: An appraisal by the NEA Committee on Radiation Protection and Public Health - November 1995

ARTICLE.COMMENT: This report summarises the accident events, its impacts on health and environment, and the lessons learned.

X.T: Arrêt définitif de Tchernobyl

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Why Chernobyl Exploded - The Real Physics Behind The Reactor

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Yet another description of the physics of the accident.

X.T: Chernobyl Doctor Fact Checks the HBO Series | Vanity Fair

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Tchernobyl: la météo nationale a-t-elle truqué des cartes en 1986, comme l'affirme Jean-Pierre Pernaut ?
X.ST: Le présentateur du JT de TF1 affirme que Météo France a déplacé, en avril 1986, un anticyclone sur une carte pour tromper les citoyens sur les conséquences du nuage radioactif. C'est faux. Mais un reportage météo diffusé le 30 avril 1986 suggérait bien qu'un anticyclone ferait barrage au nuage.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The subtitle says it all.

X.T: INSIDE CHERNOBYL REACTOR 4 CONTROL ROOM | Full Power Plant Tour #Chernobyl35

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A tourist visit of the plant: reactor 4 control room and above reactor 3.

X.T: 📚 VITE FAIT : Le nuage de Tchernobyl

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A summary of the mismanagement of the official communication after the accident.

X.T: А man who was inside Chernobyl reactor.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: An interview with AlexanderKupnyi who has been several times in the sarcophagus.

X.T: The Elephant's Foot - Corpse of Chernobyl

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Part 1 The Chernobyl Disaster Explained 1986 | A Brief History of Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A summary of the disaster.

X.T: The Chernobyl Nuclear Disaster Clean up Explained | A Plainly Difficult Nuclear Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The continuation of the previous video: the aftermath.

X.T: 35 Years Later, Studies Show a Silver Lining From Chernobyl
X.ST: One new study found that radiation exposure didn't genetically harm future generations, while another offers insights into how radiation causes thyroid cancer.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The subtitle says it all.

X.T: Something is Happening at Chernobyl…

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The seasonal variations of radiation are due to the rain water.

X.T: Chernobyl Created the World's Rarest Dogs

ARTICLE.COMMENT: I do not see the point of creating such a video about helping Chernobyl’s dogs.

X.T: How Instagram Ruined Chernobyl…Again.

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When Chernobyl became a tourism destination.

X.T: Chernobyl's Radioactive Wild Boar Paradox

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The wild boars of Chernobyl are contaminated by the fallout from atmospheric nuclear bomb tests.

X.T: ☢️ Nettoyer Tchernobyl, impossible ? - Monsieur Bidouille

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of Chernobyl current state and how it could be cleaned up.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Goiania Incident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The Goiânia accident: some scavengers stole and opened a radiotherapy source.

X.T: Goiânia Accident - South America's Nuclear Tragedy

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The same.

X.T: The San Salvador Radiation Event 1989 | A Brief History of Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When some employees of an irradiation facility have no clue about the danger of radiation.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Soreq Radiation Accident 1990 (Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Yet another case of an irradiation operator circumventing safety systems.

X.T: L'accident d'irradiation survenu en août 1991 auprès d'un accélérateur d'électrons de 2,3 MV implanté dans l'installation industrielle de la société EBS à Forbach

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A detailed description of the incident and its aftermath.

X.T: Irradiation de trois agents dans une installation de traitement par ionisation

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A less detailed description and the data has been anonymised.

X.T: The Nesvizh Radiation Event 1991 | A Plainly Difficult Nuclear Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the accident during which the operator must have bypassed several protections.

X.T: What if you put your hand in a particle accelerator?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A scientist exposed his hands to an X ray beam.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Tomsk-7 Radiological Accident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A vessel exploded to due to the bad mixing of the chemical products.

X.T: A Brief History of: David Hahn AKA The Atomic Boy Scout

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The story of DavidHahn, a teenager who tried to build a nuclear reactor in his backyard shed.

X.T: 🪐Un ado a fabriqué un réacteur nucléaire chez lui... et le FBI n'a rien vu

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The same.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Tammiku Radiation Event 1994 (Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When people scavenge nuclear waste.

X.T: The 1997 Lilo Orphaned Source Radiation Incident 1997 | Short Documentary | Plainly Difficult

ARTICLE.COMMENT: When Soviet troops leave a camp without explaining it was used for training in radiological detection.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Sarov Criticality (Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: An accident that is very similar to the Demon Core ones.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Istanbul Radiation Incident (Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The usual story of a mismanaged Cobalt 60 teletherapy source.

X.T: Worker Picks up Lost Radiation Source and Takes It Home - The Yanango Radiological Accident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all.

X.T: Tokaimura (Japan's Sep. 30, 1999) Nuclear Accident: It's Causes, Health & Environmental Effects

ARTICLE.COMMENT: This student work gives some information about JCO’s accident.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Tokaimura Criticality Incident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the accident.

X.T: The Most Radioactive Man in History - Hisashi Ouchi

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The long painful death of HisashiOuchi that doctors kept alive for 83 days.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Samut Prakan Radiation Accident (Short Documentary)

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Yet another mismanaged Cobalt 60 teletherapy source.

X.T: The Lia Radiological Accident - Nuclear Bonfire

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The Lia radiological accident.

X.T: A Brief History of: The Mayapuri Radiological Incident

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Still another mismanaged Cobalt 60 teletherapy source.

X.T: Q&A With a Former Fukushima Dai-1 Plant Manager
X.ST: "The scale of the accident was beyond my imagination"

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The title says it all: the past experience and the current feelings of the previous manager.

X.T: Le déroulement de l'accident de Fukushima Daiichi

AUTHOR.GIVENNAME: Institut de Radioprotection et de Sûreté Nucléaire

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A description of the accident.

X.T: No One Knows What to Do With Fukushima’s Endless Tanks of Radioactive Water

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Can the tritiated water be released in the ocean?

X.T: Nuclear Experts: High Radiation Estimates at Fukushima No Surprise to Us
X.ST: Despite some press reports suggesting radiation was soaring, TEPCO says high counts were expected as robot probes edged closer to one of the damaged reactors

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Robots have trouble to visit the area given the high radiation levels damaging them.

X.T: The Fukushima Nuclear Disaster - Epidemic of Ghosts

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Some basics about Fukushima, but there is little information here.

X.T: Will Fukushima’s Water Dump Set a Risky Precedent?
X.ST: Questions raised over new norms the disaster’s radioactive wastewater cleanup efforts may foster

ARTICLE.COMMENT: Japan wants to release tritium in the ocean, this may incite other countries to dump their radioactive waste the same way.

X.T: Is Fukushima's Radioactive Water Safe?

ARTICLE.COMMENT: The communication of TEPCO about the release of the tritiated water is a difficult task.

X.T: What Caused the 2013 Hueypoxtla, Mexico Radiation Event? | Plainly Difficult Disaster Documentary

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A truck transporting a Cobalt 60 source has been stolen.

X.T: Radioactive Material Accidentally Falls off a Truck Endangering the Public

ARTICLE.COMMENT: A radioactive source was lost for a week.
